cinzel.view.chat.name: Chat
cinzel.command.setApiKey.title: Cinzel: Set API key…
cinzel.command.clearApiKey.title: Cinzel: Clear API key
cinzel.command.selectModel.title: Cinzel: Select model…
cinzel.command.toggleCompletion.title: Cinzel: Toggle autocomplete
cinzel.command.clearChat.title: Cinzel: Clear conversation
cinzel.command.attachSelection.title: Cinzel: Attach selection to chat
cinzel.command.attachFile.title: Cinzel: Attach file to chat
cinzel.command.fixBug.title: Cinzel: Fix problem with AI
cinzel.command.fixFileProblems.title: Cinzel: Fix file problems with AI
cinzel.config.models.desc: Models available in the chat. Each entry: `id`, `label`, `provider` (`openai` or `anthropic`), `baseUrl`, `model` and (for Anthropic) `maxTokens`. The API key is requested per `baseUrl` and stored in the system keychain.
cinzel.config.completion.enabled.desc: Inline autocomplete (ghost text) via a local FIM model on Ollama.
cinzel.config.completion.model.desc: FIM model. MUST be a `-base` build (with `insert` capability); the `instruct` variant does not do FIM.
cinzel.config.completion.maxTokens.desc: Max tokens per suggestion (keep it short and fast).
cinzel.config.responseLanguage.desc: Language the AI replies in. `auto` follows the editor's display language.
